text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh... Boom!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Spe! Grass! Tonight's the summer carnaval!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: We can't lose to any of those masked people!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We all need to shake our fists in the air, wiggle
our hips, and commence mamboing! That means
you two as well!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
I'm not going that far. Japanese culture is also
about elegance.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll do it, El! I don't know how much wiggling I can
actually do, but I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The summer festival has a much bigger turnout
than I expected.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, Trainer! Get a load of that group over
there!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Even the old people aren't getting tired! And that
dance! It's so funky and cool!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sure enough, their movements certainly seem to
belie their age.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Wearing a mask lets you become a different
person. I explain that they wear the masks to
become incarnations of the gods and to pray for
a good harvest and good health.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ya veo! I see! So they aren't doing it to hide their true identities.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We've got some stiff competition, but we're
Umamusume! We run and dance for a living!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
We're not gonna lose! Not even to incarnations of
the gods!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Let's go, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Wait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The festival dance seems to go on forever.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... I can't keep going, El...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué? But Spe, look how happy everyone looks.
They're counting on us for a good performance!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Doesn't that just make all your exhaustion go
away? I can dance forever knowing everyone is
having a good time.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Not at aaall... Maybe it would if this were to win a
race, but...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I... I'm just not a party person!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: A party person... Hmmm...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You have a unique strength.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
You can convert the support of others into your
own power.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: So that's what she meant...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whoosh... Boom!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, El? Are you angry?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Not at all! I'll take it from here, Spe!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Who's today's top bill? The summer child with the
spirit of a local, who loves entertaining more than
anything!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
The name is El Condor Pasa! And I'm taking the
dance circle by storm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa ends up being the only person
who could dance throughout the whole festival.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After the festival...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I figured out what Suzuka meant today, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I convert support into my own strength.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All Umamusume run with the encouragement from
the cheers of the crowd, our heads filled with
dreams of victory.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But I don't just do it to win. I run to win and entertain.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
What does it mean to be the world's strongest
racer? It means being the world's greatest
entertainer!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I found another dream. Although, I
think it might've been there all along.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
It's just like with those masked people at the
festival.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Everyone gets real excited, combines their
wishes, puts on their masks, and then dances!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: All in order to have the best time possible!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Maybe that's what's different between me and the
others. And not only that, I've got...
choice_data_list: The gift from your father, right?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that's right.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
All my papa's dreams rest in this mask... and now,
they've been passed down to me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa takes off her mask in the light of
the moon and places it on a rock.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I don't wear this mask to hide myself.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I wear it to become stronger than anyone else...
and to entertain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if she didn't realize it before, El Condor
Pasa's always entertained the masses with her
over-the-top actions and boasting.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even at the Takarazuka Kinen, when she
overcame Silence Suzuka...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm certain one of the reasons she was able to do
that was her desire to delight the audience.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Trainer, please don't forget... why I do this.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Don't forget that my true dream is to entertain
everyone.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: If you understand...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Then please... offer your feelings to this mask too.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We close our eyes and pray together—a lovely
festival rite in which to prepare for the upcoming
fall.
